overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy RPG showing an armored character traversing a stormy marshland with tall reeds and wooden fences, then entering a rustic farmhouse to explore the dimly lit interior with NPCs. The atmosphere is moody and stormy with dark swirling clouds.

approaching the wooden farmhouse entrance from the marsh

narrow waterway with rocks running alongside the fence

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a stormy marshland with dense tall grass, passing a wooden split-rail fence and a narrow stream. A wooden farmhouse looms on the left while a stone monument stands visible in the distant fog. The character transitions from grass to a stone path while approaching the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic farmhouse interior with dining area and bookshelves

events.description: character enters the wooden farmhouse through the doorway
transition from stormy outdoor light to dim interior illuminated by lanterns

agents.ego_description: entering the building and walking around the interior to observe NPCs and furnishings

notable_agents.action: villager standing near the dining table inside the house
armored character standing near the interior wall

entered.detail: dark timber wall panels with vertical planks
long wooden table with baskets and cooking items
large black iron pot sitting on the floor near the table
tall shelves filled with books and pottery
lit lantern hanging on the wall providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dimly lit farmhouse interior, leaving the storm behind. Inside, wooden walls and furniture dominate the space, with a dining table, bookshelves, and hanging lanterns. NPCs stand around the room as the character explores the rustic interior, moving from the entrance toward the back of the house.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stormy, open marshland into the sheltered, dimly lit interior of a rustic farmhouse. It begins with the character traversing dense tall grass and passing a wooden split-rail fence beside a narrow stream, while a stone monument remains visible through the distant fog. As the character moves from the grass onto a stone path, the camera approaches the looming wooden building and crosses the threshold, leaving the storm behind. The scene then shifts into the farmhouse interior, where the open air is replaced by wooden walls, bookshelves, and hanging lanterns. Finally, the camera glides past a dining table and stationary NPCs as the character explores the rustic space, moving from the entrance toward the back of the house.
